creator: rlmuellerny@gmail.com
text:
I am unable to locate the libintl.so.6 file, required by a program I am running. Can you send me this file? I apologize in advance if this is a dumb request, but I am a network guy and am new to UNIX.

Thanks in advance for your time.

How-To-Repeat: Download ESET Gateway Security and try to run it. It claims that it needs libintl.so.6.
